venues.name: LuxFrágil
venues.vibe: Iconic Lisbon nightclub, famous for its sunrise views from the balcony. A must-visit.

venues.name: Ministerium Club
venues.vibe: Electronic music powerhouse set in an 18th-century government building. Where history meets house.

venues.name: Harbour
venues.vibe: The essential after-hours spot on the riverfront. The party starts at dawn.

venues.name: Komplex
venues.vibe: A multi-story creative hub and nightclub on the city's outskirts, featuring international electronic acts.

venues.name: Kremlin
venues.vibe: A legendary, revamped electronic music club with a notorious past and a fresh look.
